Sandbox_STA_BetterHutches_WoodchipsBagAm: Maximum number of sacks of woodchips per hutch.
Sandbox_STA_BetterHutches_DirtinessReduc: Dirtiness is reduced by 1 / Dirtiness Reduction. This factor scales how with full the hutch is with woodchips (Maximum Woodchips gives the full reduction.)
Sandbox_STA_BetterHutches_FertilizedEggL: The minimum Animal Care level required to distinguish fertilized eggs.
